subcodes.first_line: We have made mention of Jinab-i-Mahmúd, upon whom rest the glory of God, from among the people of Nún and Rá. We beseech God to protect him and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب محمود علیه بهاء الله از اهل نون و را را ذکر نمودیم نسئل الله ان یحفظه و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort, @rejection, opposition and persecution
